title: Ekron, KY
description: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> EKRON <LINE> <LINE><LEFT> <SIZE:small> With a population of under two hundred, Ekron is a place where the locals won't bother you. <LINE> <LINE> Most of the residents work in the AMZ Steelworks plant, or make the daily commute to Brandenburg to the north or Irvington to the south. <LINE> <LINE> They don't get a lot of time to relax but don't worry - they'll always make time for a chat over your backyard fence!
